name: Amcil Limited
analysis: AMH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.9200, stop A$0.8712, target A$1.0350 (2.36:1) — then trail it.
